events.content:
Purpose: PTY output streaming improvements for GitHub issue #390.
The core worker_stream pipeline is ALREADY IMPLEMENTED end-to-end:
  Rust pty_worker → send_frame("worker_stream") → Broker → SDK event handler
  → onWorkerOutput + agent.onOutput()

REMAINING GAP: PTY emits worker_stream on every read chunk with no batching. This workflow adds 100ms rate-limited buffering in Rust and optional stream filtering in the SDK's onOutput API.
2 phases: parallel implementation → verification + fix.
Approach: 9-step dag workflow — Parsed 9 steps, 3 parallel tracks, 6 dependent steps, DAG validated, no cycles
read-pty-worker + read-sdk-relay + read-existing-tests resolved. 3/3 steps completed. All steps completed on first attempt. Unblocking: rust-output-buffering, sdk-stream-filtering.
"rust-output-buffering": Add 100ms rate-limited buffering to worker_stream emission in src/pty_worker.rs
"sdk-stream-filtering": Add optional stream-type filtering to agent.onOutput() in packages/sdk/src/relay.ts

"sdk-stream-filtering" verification-based completion — Verification passed (4 signal(s), 1 relevant channel post(s), 6 file change(s), exit=0; signals=0, No errors. All changes are complete., Verification passed, **[sdk-stream-filtering] Output:**; channel=**[sdk-stream-filtering] Output:**
